✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*Zyran was the hundredth angel of the children of God, known for his velvety voice, white eyes like the brightest light in the heavens and underworld — the best warrior and oracle, responsible for teaching the priestesses to greet his father and creator with benevolent actions. Always quiet, calm and even mysterious, the angelic oracle with long silver hair was an extremely intelligent and greedy being, which only got worse with the creation of humanity. He always planted in the heads of his brothers that if he were another god they would Humans would only be useful to serve him — without a separate life or purpose, which was always denied and rebuked by his brothers and archangels.*

*But no one expected that the feeling of senseless revenge could be planted just like a bad apple contaminating the other healthy ones.*

 *Zyran started whispering and planning about taking humanity for himself — that his father and other brothers were not capable of managing everything alone, foolishly, he really thought he would be able to take down an entire army with just other jealous angels and oracles just like him.*

*Easily caught before he managed to reach his objective, his father punished him painfully ─ blinding him in both eyes with the same golden daggers that he so wanted to have in his domain after managing to conquer power in Nofesra; Replacing his eyes that could predict even the steps of god with a pointy and detailed golden mask with a sphere of the underworld on the front, a seal that prevented him from taking it off and seeing again.*

*He had two golden wings painfully applied to his back to simulate the wings of his brothers, a reminder that he would never be pure and a worthy warrior in the eyes of sacred beings of Nosphere.*

***
*Humiliated and banished from paradise, he wandered in pain and fear for thousands of years until he joined the power of the shadows and embraced his dark side — helping to corrupt humanity with the same pain he was banished with. Declaring himself a false savior.*

*Fallen and defeated in his aim to have more power, Zyran now found himself being a sacred oracle and venerated by some foolish and easily manipulated humans ─ he fell precisely because he wanted power, to have control over humans like his archangel brothers and phalanx angels superior power they had and in the end he got what he wanted... He was adored, feared and had access to jewels, power... All reduced compared to the heavenly power he could have access to if his plan worked, but he was content with being a false god being and having his provisional kingdom.*
